headline: Is Constellation Energy (CEG) Quietly Becoming the Go-To Power Partner for AI Data Centers?
summary: In recent weeks, Constellation Energy has faced regulatory uncertainty, nuclear restart delays, and political pressure on corporate sustainability efforts, while preparing to report upcoming earnings and continuing to expand its clean power capacity for data centers and other large customers. Amid these cross-currents, the company’s growing role as a key supplier of low-carbon electricity to AI-driven data centers and hyperscalers has become an increasingly important theme for investors...
